title: Storage Basket 25x25x25cm – Wicker Style Woven Cube Organiser with Handles, Durable Eco-Friendly Decorative Storage Box for Bathroom, Bedroom, Living Room, Toy Storage, Laundry & Home Organisation,2pc
features: 【Eco-Friendly & Stylish Design】Crafted from sturdy imitation wicker in warm, natural tones, this 25×25×25cm storage basket brings both durability and charm to your home. Completely chemical-free, it’s a safe and sustainable choice for eco-conscious households.

【Perfect Size for Every Corner】With its practical cube shape, this basket fits neatly into shelves, wardrobes, and under tables. Ideal for tidying away everyday essentials without compromising on style, it adds an elegant touch to any room.

【Strong & Reliable Build】The reinforced woven handles make carrying effortless, while the weighted flat base keeps the basket stable and prevents tipping. Smooth inner lining ensures delicate items stay safe and protected.

【Multi-Purpose Home Organisation】From storing books, magazines, DVDs, and toys to organising toiletries, kitchen goods, or laundry, this versatile basket adapts to all your household needs. A single basket that does the work of many.

【Adds Warmth to Any Interior】Whether placed in the living room, bedroom, bathroom, or even as part of festive decorations, this basket blends functionality with natural elegance. A timeless accessory that enhances your home’s cosy atmosphere.
description: Product Description Stylish Wicker Design Crafted with a natural wicker-look weave, these baskets add a touch of elegance to any room while keeping clutter hidden. Durable & Eco-Friendly Made from high-quality, eco-conscious materials that are lightweight yet sturdy—built to withstand daily use. Convenient Handles Integrated handles on both sides make it easy to pull out from shelves or carry around the home. Laundry Helper Compact size for easy sorting. Living Room Touch Hide toys, books & daily clutter. Bathroom Ready Store towels & toiletries in style. Product Details Product Details Dimensions: 25 x 25 x 25 cm Style: Wicker-look woven cube Colour: Neutral tone to match any décor Pack: 2 pieces Upgrade your home organisation today with these durable, and stylish storage cubes—perfect for every room in your house.
